800.full_name: 'Aqil bin al-Bukayr b. 'AbduYalil b. Nashib b. Ghira b. Sa'd b. Laith b. Bakr b. 'Abd Manat b. Kinan
800.bio:
It is also said that he is 'Aqeel bin Abi al-Bukayr...
An Ally of Banu 'Adi b. Ka'b. The brotherhood was made b/w him and Mubashir bin al-Mundhir.

801.full_name: Khalid bin al-Bukayr b. 'Abdu Yalil b. Nashib b. Ghira b. Sa'd b. Laith b. Bakr b. 'Abd Manat
801.bio:
It is also said that he is Khalid bin Abi al-Bukayr...
An Ally of Banu Naufil of B. 'Adi b. Ka'b. The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Zayd bin al-Dithna.

802.full_name: Iyas bin al-Bukayr b. 'Abdu Yalil b. Nashib b. Ghira b. Sa'd b. Laith b. Bakr b. 'Abd Manat b. Kinan
802.bio:
It is also said that he is Iyas bin Abi al-Bukayr...
An Ally of Banu 'Adi b. Ka'b. The Brotherhood was made b/w him and al-Harith bin Khuzma.

803.full_name: 'Amir bin al-Bukayr b. 'Abdu Yalil b. Nashib b. Ghira b. Sa'd b. Laith b. Bakr b. Abd Manat b. Kinan
803.bio:
It is also said that he is 'Amir bin Abi al-Bukayr...
An Ally of Banu Naufil of B. 'Adi b. Ka'b. The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Thabit bin Qays bin Shimas.

804.full_name: Kannaz bin Hussain b. Yarbu b. 'Amr b. Kharasha b. S'ad b. Tarif b. Jillan b. Ghanm b. Ghani
804.arabic: أبو مرثد الغنوي كناز بن الحصين
804.bio: An Ally of Hamza (RA) of B. Hashim from tribe of Ghatafan.

805.full_name: Marthad bin Kannaz b. Hussain b. Yarbu b. 'Amr b. Kharasha b. S'ad b. Tarif b. Jillan b. Ghanm
805.bio: An Ally of Hamza (RA) of B. Hashim. The brotherhood was made b/w him and 'Aus bin Samit.

806.short_name: Unays b. Marthad b. Abi Marthad
806.full_name: Unays bMarthad b. Kannaz b. Hussain b. Yarbu b. 'Amr b. Kharasha b. S'ad b. Tarif b. Jillan b. Ghanm
806.arabic: أبو يزيد أنيس بن مرثد بن أبي مرثد الغنوي
806.bio: An Ally of Hamza (RA) of B. Hashim. According to some he was son of Abu Marthad and not his grandson.

807.full_name: 'Uqba bin Wahb  b. Rabi'a b. Asad b. Suhayb b. Malik b. kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzayma
807.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Asad b. Khuzayma

808.full_name: 'Ukkasha bin Mihsan b. Hurthan b. Qays b. Murra b. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzayma
808.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Asad b. Khuzayma

809.full_name: Abu Sinan bin Mihsan b. Hurthan b. Qays b. Murra b. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzayma
809.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Asad b. Khuzayma. According to some sources, he died in 5 AH.

810.short_name: Sinan bin Abu Sinan bin Mihsan al-Asadi
810.full_name: Sinan bin Abu Sinan bin Mihsan b. Hurthan b. Qays b. Murra b. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad
810.arabic: سنان بن أبي سنان بن محصن الأسدي
810.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Asad b. Khuzayma. He was the first person take oath at Ridhwan.

811.full_name: Muhriz bin Nadla b. 'Abdullah b. Murra b. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzayma
811.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Asad b. Khuzayma. He saw a dream about his martyrdom one day before.

812.full_name: Rabi'a bin Aktham  b. Sakhbara b. 'Amr b. Lukayz b. 'Amir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzayma
812.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Asad b. Khuzayma. He was martyred by a Jew man using a branch of date tree.

813.full_name: Yazid bin Ruqaysh b. Ri'ab b. Ya'mar b. sabra b. Murra b. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzaym
813.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Asad b. Khuzayma.

814.full_name: Thaqf bin 'Amr bin Sameet  of B. Hajr from B. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzaym
814.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Kabir, a clan of B.Sulaym

815.full_name: Mudlij bin 'Amr bin Sameet  of B. Hajr from B. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzayma
815.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Kabir, a clan of B.Sulaym

816.full_name: Malik bin 'Amr bin Sameet  of B. Hajr from B. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzaym
816.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Kabir, a clan of B.Sulam

817.bio: Ally of B. Nawfal bin 'Abd Manaf. The brotherhood was made b/w him and Tamim Maula Khirash bin al-Samma.

818.father_name: Rashida bin Azabb b. Jazila b. lakhum

819.short_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Hatib bin Abi Balta'ah
819.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Hatib bin Abi Balta'a b. 'Amr b. 'Umayr b. Salma al-Lakhmi
819.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن حاطب بن أبي بلتعة اللخمي
819.bio: He is considered as a Tabi'

820.short_name: Sa'd Mawla Hatib bin Abi Balta'ah
820.full_name: Sa'd bin khauli b. Sabra b. Daream b. Qays b. Malik b. 'Umaira b. 'Amir Qadhai'a
820.arabic: سعد بن خولي مولى حاطب بن أبي بلتعة
820.bio: Ally of B. Asad. According to others, he was martyred at Uhud.

821.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Sa'd bin khauli b. Sabra b. Daream b. Qays b. Malik b. 'Umaira b. 'Amir Qadhai'a
821.arabic: عبد الله بن سعد بن خولي

822.full_name: 'Umayr  ibn Abi Waqqas (Malik) bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b
822.mother_name: Hamnah bint Sufyan bin Umayyah bin 'Abd Shams
822.bio: He was 16 years old when martyred at Badr.

823.short_name: Mistah bin Uthatha b. 'Abbad b. al-Mutt.
823.full_name: 'Auf bin Uthatha bin 'Abbad bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
823.arabic: مسطح بن أثاثة بن عباد بن المطلب

824.full_name: Mudhtaja' bin Uthatha bin 'Abbad bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
824.arabic: مضطجع بن أثاثة بن عباد بن المطلب

825.short_name: Hind bint Uthatha b. 'Abbad b. al-Mutt.
825.full_name: Hind bint Uthatha bin 'Abbad bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
825.arabic: هند بنت أثاثة بن عباد بن المطلب

826.short_name: Umm Mistah bint Abi Ruhm b. al-Muttalib
826.full_name: Salma/Rayta bint Abi Ruhm bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
826.arabic: أم مسطح بنت أبي رهم بن المطلب

827.full_name: Amina bint Mihsan b. Hurthan b. Qays b. Murra b. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzayma
827.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Asad b. Khuzayma
827.students: مولاها عدي بن دينار,مولاها آخر أبو الحسن,11004,5324,10994,عمرة أخت نافع مولى حمنة بنت شجاع

828.full_name: Dhu'l-Shimalyn 'Umair bin 'Abd 'Amr b. Nadla b. 'Amr b. Ghubshan b. Saleem b. Malik of al-Khuza'a
828.arabic: ذو الشمالين عمير بن عبد عمرو
828.bio: Brotherhood was made b/w him and Yazid bin al-Harith ibn Qays (ibn Fushum)(id:282). Both Were Martyred at Badr.

829.short_name: Mas'ud bin Rabi'a b. 'Amr of al-Qara
829.full_name: Mas'ud bin Rabi'a b. 'Amr b. Sa'd b. 'Abdul 'Uzza b. Muhlim b. Ghalib b. A'idha from Khuzayma
829.bio:
The brotherhood was made b/w him and 'Ubaid bin al-Tihan
Full Lineage: Mas'ud bin Rabi'a(al-Rabi') b. 'Amr b. Sa'd b. 'Abdul 'Uzza (Hawala) b. Muhlim b. Ghalib b. A'idha b. Baitha'(Athba') (b. Malih) b. al-Hun (al-Qara) b. Khuzayma b. Mudraka

830.full_name: 'Amir bin Fuhayra, the client of Abu Bakr
830.arabic: عامر بن فهيرة التيمي مولى أبي بكر الصديق
830.bio: He was freed by Abu Bakr(ra). According to some traditions, He was lifted and buried by angels after his martyrdom.

831.full_name: 'Amr b. Suraqa b. Ma'tamar b. Anas b. Adhat b. Riyah b. Abdullah b. Qurt b. Razah b. 'Adi b. Ka'b

832.full_name: 'Abdullah b. Suraqa b. Ma'tamar b. Anas b. Adhat b. Riyah b.' Abdullah b. Qurt b. Razah b. 'Adi

833.full_name: Waqid bin 'Abdullah b. 'Abd Manaf b. 'Arin('Aziz b. Tha'laba b. Yarbu' b. Hanzalah b. Malik of Tamim
833.arabic: واقد بن عبد الله بن عبد مناف التميمي

834.full_name: Khauliy bin Abi Khauliy('Amr) b. Zuhair b. Khythama b. Abi Himran al-Harith b. Mu'wiyah of al-Ja'fi
834.arabic: خولي بن أبي خولي بن عمرو بن زهير

835.full_name: Malik bin Abi Khauliy('Amr) b. Zuhair b. Khythama b. Abi Himran al-Harith b. Mu'wiyah of al-Ja'fi
835.arabic: مالك بن أبي خولي بن عمرو بن زهير

836.full_name: al-Arqam bin Abi al-Arqam bin Asad b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murrah
836.bio: His house was used by Prophet(ﷺ) for early secret Dawah.

837.full_name: 'Amr bin Mihsan b. Hurthan b. Qays b. Murra b. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzayma

838.full_name: Wahb bin Mihsan b. Hurthan b. Qays b. Murra b. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzayma
838.arabic: وهب بن محصن بن حرثان الأسدي

839.full_name: Muhammad bin Iyas bin al-Bukayr b. 'Abdu Yalil b. Nashib b. Ghira b. Sa'd b. Laith b. Bakr of Kanana
839.arabic: محمد بن إياس بن البكير الليثي المدني
839.bio: His father was an ally of Banu 'Adi b. Ka'b. He is considered as a Tabi'.

840.full_name: Abu Sufyan bin Wahb  b. Rabi'a b. Asad b. Suhayb b. Malik b. kathir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad
840.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Asad b. Khuzayma.

841.full_name: Umm Hakam bint Abu Sufyan b. Harb b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy
841.arabic: أم الحكم بنت أبي سفيان بن حرب
841.children: 'Abdur rahman bin 'Abdullah bin 'Uthman bin 'Abdullah bin Rabi'a al-Thaqifi

842.full_name: Juwayriyya bint Abu Sufyan b. Harb b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy
842.arabic: جويرية بنت أبي سفيان بن حرب

843.full_name: Quriaba bint Abu Sufyan b. Harb b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy
843.arabic: قريبة بنت أبي سفيان بن حرب

844.full_name: 'Utba ibn Abu Sufyan b. Harb b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy
844.arabic: عتبة بن أبي سفيان بن حرب

845.full_name: Umaima bint Abi Sufyan bin Harb b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
845.arabic: أميمة بنت أبي سفيان بن حرب بن أمية
845.mother_name: Safiyyah bint Abi al-'As bin Umayya

846.full_name: 'Unbasa bin Abi Sufyan bin Harb b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
846.arabic: عنبسة بن أبي سفيان بن حرب بن أمية

847.full_name: 'Uzza bint Abi Sufyan bin Harb b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
847.arabic: عزة بنت أبي سفيان بن حرب بن أمية
847.mother_name: Safiyyah bint Abi al-'As bin Umayya

848.full_name: Durrah bint Abi Sufyan bin Harb b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
848.arabic: درة بنت أبي سفيان بن حرب بن أمية
848.mother_name: Safiyyah bint Abi al-'As bin Umayya

849.full_name: Hamnah bint Abi Sufyan bin Harb b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
849.arabic: حمنة بنت أبي سفيان بن حرب بن أمية
849.mother_name: Safiyyah bint Abi al-'As bin Umayya

850.full_name: Zaynab/Maymuna bint Abi Sufyan bin Harb bin Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy
850.arabic: زينب/ميمونة بنت أبي سفيان بن حرب
850.mother_name: Lubaba bint Abi al-'Aas bin Umayya

851.full_name: Hind bint Abi Sufyan bin Harb bin Umayya
851.arabic: هند بنت أبي سفيان بن حرب
851.siblings: 'Amr bin Abi Sufyan bin Harb bin Umayya

852.full_name: al-Qa'Qa' bin Ma'bad b. Zurarah b. 'Adas b. Zayd b. 'Abdullah b. Daram al-Tamimi

853.full_name: 'Auf bin al-Qa'Qa' bin Ma'bad b. Zurarah b. 'Adas b. Zayd b. 'Abdullah b. Daram al-Tamimi

854.full_name: Fakhta bint Sa'id ibn al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
854.arabic: فاختة بنت أبي أحيحة سعد بن العاص

855.short_name: Arwa bint Abi al-'As b. Umayya
855.full_name: Arwa bint Abi al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
855.arabic: أروى بنت أبي العاص بن أمية بن عبد شمس
855.father_name: Abi al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams

856.short_name: al-Hakam bin Abi al-'As b. Umayya
856.full_name: al-Hakam bin Abi al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
856.arabic: أالحكم بن أبي العاص بن أمية بن عبد شمس
856.father_name: Abi al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams

857.short_name: Hind bint al-Hakam bin Abi al-'As
857.full_name: Hind bint al-Hakam bin Abi al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
857.arabic: هند بن الحكم بن أبي العاص بن أمية

858.short_name: Marwan bin al-Hakam bin Abi al-'As
858.full_name: Marwan bin al-Hakam b. Abi al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
858.arabic: مروان بن الحكم بن أبي العاص بن أمية
858.bio: He was 4th Umayyad Caliph from 64 AH/684 CE to 65 AH/685 CE

859.short_name: Mu'awiya bin al-Mughira bin Abi al-'As
859.full_name: Mu'awiya bin al-Mughira b. Abi al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
859.arabic: معاوية بن المغيرة بن أبي العاص بن أمية
859.father_name: al-Mughira b. Abi al-'As b. Umayya

860.full_name: A'isha bint Mu'awiya bin al-Mughira b. Abi al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy
860.arabic: عائشة بنت معاوية بن المغيرة بن أبي العاص

861.full_name: Busra bint Safwan bin Nawfal b. Asad bin 'Abdul-'Uzza bin Quasyy bin Kilab b. Murrah
861.arabic: بسرة بنت صفوان بن نوفل بن أسد

862.full_name: Fatima bint 'Amir bin Hudhaym b. Salaman b. Rabi'a b. Sa'd b. Jumah b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b

863.full_name: Abu Sanabil('Amr/Habba) bin Ba'kak b. al-harith b. al-Sabaaq b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Quassy b. Kilab
863.arabic: أبو السنابل بن بعكك بن الحارث
863.mother_name: 'Amra bint Aws b. Abi 'Amr from B.'Uzra

865.full_name: Sa'id bin 'Amir bin Hudhaym b. Salaman b. Rabi'a b. Sa'd b. Jumah b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b
865.mother_name: Arwa bint Abi Mu'yat of B.Umayya

866.full_name: Jamil bin 'Amir bin Hudhaym b. Salaman b. Rabi'a b. Sa'd b. Jumah b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b

867.short_name: Wahb bin Sa'd bin Abi Sarh
867.full_name: Wahb bin Sa'd bin Abi Sarh b. al-Harith b. Habib b. Juzayma b. Malik b. Hisl b. 'Amir b. Lu'ayy
867.arabic: وهب بن سعد بن أبي سرح
867.father_name: Sa'd bin Abi Sarh b. al-Harith
867.bio: The brotherhood was made b/w him and Suwayd bin 'Amr

868.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Sa'd bin Abi Sarh b. al-Harith b. Habib b. Juzayma b. Malik b. Hisl b. 'Amir b. Lu'ayy
868.arabic: عبد الله بن سعد بن أبي سرح
868.father_name: Sa'd bin Abi Sarh b. al-Harith
868.bio: He was an early convert but then apostated. 'Uthman bin 'Affan (his brother due to suckling) gave him protection on Day of opening of Makkah and later reverted back to Islam. He was governer for Egypt for 'Uthman bin 'Affan.

870.full_name: Mihja bin Salah, a client of 'Umar bin al-Khattab
870.arabic: مهجع بن صالح مولى عمر بن الخطاب
870.bio: He was the first person martyred on the day of Badr.

871.full_name: Jubayr bin Mut'im b. 'Adi b. Nawfal b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy
871.mother_name: Umm Jamil bint Saa'id of B. 'Amir
871.bio: His father supported Prophet(ﷺ) on couple of occasions.

872.full_name: 'Uqba bin al-Harith bin 'Amir b. Nawfal b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy

873.full_name: al-Walid bin al-Harith bin 'Amir b. Nawfal b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra b. Ka'b

874.full_name: Zaynab bint al-Harith bin 'Amir b. Nawfal b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra b. Ka'b b. Lu'ay

880.full_name: 'Ubaidullah bin 'Ady bin al-Khayyar b. 'Ady b. Nawfal b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra
880.arabic: عبيد الله بن عدي بن الخيار
880.mother_name: Umm Qital bin Usayd bin Abi al-'Aays b. Umayya
880.bio: According to some his father was killed as disbeliever.

881.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin 'Ady bin al-Khayyar b. 'Ady b. Nawfal b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra
881.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن عدي بن الخيار

882.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Ady bin al-Khayyar b. 'Ady b. Nawfal b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra
882.arabic: عبد الله بن عدي بن الخيار

883.full_name: 'Iyyad  bin 'Ady bin al-Khayyar b. 'Ady b. Nawfal b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra

884.full_name: al-Walid bin 'Ady bin al-Khayyar b. 'Ady b. Nawfal b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra

896.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Umayya b. Abi 'Ubaida b. Hammam b. al-Harith .. Malik b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim
896.bio:
He may be from Thaqif or B. Tamim.
According to some, he was son of Ya'la bin Umayya.

897.full_name: Ya'la bin Umayya bin Abi 'Ubaida b. Hammam b. al-Harith b. Bakr ... Malik b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim
897.bio: Also known as: Abu Safwan, Ya'la bin Munya

898.full_name: Salma bin Umayya b. Abi 'Ubaida b. Hammam b. al-Harith .. Malik b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim
898.arabic: سلمة بن أمية بن أبي عبيدة التميمي
898.bio: He may be from Thaqif or B. Tamim.

899.full_name: Nafisa bint Umayya bin Abi 'Ubayd b. Hammam b. al-Harith b. Bakr ... Malik b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim
899.arabic: نفيسة بنت أمية بن أبي عبيد
899.bio: She is the one who arranged things b/w the Messenger of Allah(asw) and Khadija until their marriage.
